calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Stanley Anastasio, Trustee of the U.D.T. dated April 8, 1986, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Michael McGehee, Jr.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on September 7, 2010, which set the trial date of September 27, 2010. Matter was continued as defendant was in the hospital on that date. Written notice of today's trial date was provided to defendant via letter dated September 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Stanley Anastacio, Trustee of the U.D.T. dated April 8, 2010, and against defendant Michael McGehee, Jr. as follows:

Holdover Damages - $956.12.
Costs - $318.65.

Total - $1.274.77.

Additionally, plaintiff Stanley Anastasio, Trustee of the U.D.T. dated April 8, 1986, is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1693 Polk Street, No. 208, San Francisco, CA 94109. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Continued To Oct-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Stanley Anastasio is present. Represented by Deedee MacDonald.
Attorney, David Wasserman, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Michael McGehee, is present.
Attorney, Nathanael Player, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of SEP-27-2010 remains on calendar.
